source.title: Core Education Launches CoreXP: The AI-Powered Operating Model Built for Higher Education
source.snippet: Core Education launches CoreXP, an AI-powered operating model built to help higher ed institutions redesign decision-making and improve performance.

rejection_reason: 기업 제품 보도자료 수준. 독자적 뉴스 가치 부족. 분석적 관점 부재.
